Linesheet Manager
172 variants 0 SKUs

Product Entry Form

Use one shared product form, then add colour variants underneath. Each saved variant still becomes one line in the master list.

Product saved to Master Data.
Search Product from Master List
⌕
Shared Product Information
Measurements will build a matrix from the sizes you type. Toggle between CM and IN. Inches may be entered as fractions (e.g. 1/2, 1 1/4), and ranges are accepted (e.g. 12-13 or 12 1/2 - 13).
Auto-fills as 8-digit + .00. Override if needed.
Pricing
SGD RRP without GST is auto-calculated using 9% GST. Overseas prices auto-fill from the offshore price directory.
Measurements Product Designers
Headers are generated from the sizing field.
Measurement PointAdd sizes above (CM)ToleranceAction
Variants / Colours
Only variant-specific fields live here: colour, SKU, barcode, product image, lookbook image.

  • Oxford Long Sleeve ShirtLinesheet   06 May 2026 12:47 pm
    Description
    —→Made from a cotton blend oxford fabric, this long sleeve shirt features a relaxed boxy fit with an embroidered logo at the front. Designed with side panels for added shape, it is finished with an angular front hem, a curved back hem, and back pleat shoulder details with topstitching.

    —→Gently clean lenses with a microfiber cloth. Avoid exposure to chemicals, perfumes, and sunscreens. Do not wipe lenses when dry or dusty. Store in protective case to prevent scratches.
  • TangentLinesheet   05 May 2026 12:29 pm
    Washcare
    test→Eyewear Frame: 100% cellulose acetate and 100% stainless steel Eyewear Lens: CR-29 (UV Protection level: 100% UVA/UVB)
  • TangentLinesheet   05 May 2026 12:29 pm
    Description
    test→Designed with a softly rounded silhouette, slim arms, and engraved branding, Tangent adds a refined touch to both casual and polished looks. Comes with a custom aluminium case for easy storage and protection. All pieces in our Parallel™ Eyewear collection are UV protective and polarised, offering the best comfort for your eyes.

'+html+''], {type:'application/vnd.ms-excel'}); const a = document.createElement('a'); a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob); a.download = 'btv_linesheet_export.xls'; a.click(); URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href); } function printLinesheet(){ renderLinesheet(); switchView('linesheet'); setTimeout(function(){ window.print(); }, 350); } // ---------- INITIALIZATION ---------- function renderDashboard(){ var grid=document.getElementById("team-task-grid"); var today=new Date(); today.setHours(0,0,0,0); var TEAMS=[ {id:'merch',label:'Merch',color:'#1a5276',bg:'#d4e6f1', fields:[{key:'name',label:'Product Name'},{key:'category',label:'Category'},{key:'variant',label:'Colour/Variant'},{key:'sgd',label:'SGD RRP'},{key:'launchDate',label:'Launch Date'}]}, {id:'design',label:'Design',color:'#935116',bg:'#fdebd0', fields:[{key:'description',label:'Description'},{key:'washcare',label:'Washcare'},{key:'fabric',label:'Fabric'},{key:'productImg',label:'Product Image'},{key:'lookbookImg',label:'Lookbook Image'}]}, {id:'prod',label:'Prod',color:'#0e6251',bg:'#d5f5e3', fields:[{key:'hscode',label:'HS Code'},{key:'sku',label:'SKU'},{key:'barcode',label:'Barcode'}]}, {id:'pd',label:'Product Designers',color:'#6c3483',bg:'#e8daef', fields:[{key:'fabric',label:'Fabric Composition'},{key:'weightGrams',label:'Product Weight'},{key:'measurementSummary',label:'Measurement Chart'}]} ]; function daysTo(dt){ if(!dt) return null; var d=new Date(dt); d.setHours(0,0,0,0); d.setDate(d.getDate()-30); return Math.round((d-today)/86400000); } function getDueDate(dt){ if(!dt) return ''; var d=new Date(dt); d.setDate(d.getDate()-30); return d.toISOString().split('T')[0]; } function urgTag(days){ if(days===null) return {color:'#888',bg:'#ececec',lbl:'No date'}; if(days<0) return {color:'#991b1b',bg:'#fee2e2',lbl:'Overdue'}; if(days===0) return {color:'#991b1b',bg:'#fee2e2',lbl:'Due today'}; if(days<=7) return {color:'#b45309',bg:'#fef3c7',lbl:days+'d to due'}; if(days<=21) return {color:'#1d4ed8',bg:'#dbeafe',lbl:days+'d to due'}; return {color:'#555',bg:'#f0f0f0',lbl:days+'d to due'}; } if(grid){ grid.innerHTML=TEAMS.map(function(team){ var outstanding=products.filter(function(p){ if(p.linesheetComplete) return false; return team.fields.some(function(f){return !p[f.key];}); }); outstanding.sort(function(a,b){ var da=daysTo(a.launchDate), db=daysTo(b.launchDate); if(da===null&&db===null) return 0; if(da===null) return 1; if(db===null) return -1; return da-db; }); var rows=outstanding.length?outstanding.map(function(p){ var days=daysTo(p.launchDate); var urg=urgTag(days); var missing=team.fields.filter(function(f){return !p[f.key];}).map(function(f){return f.label;}); var nm=escapeHtml(p.name||'Unnamed'); if(p.variant) nm+=' — '+escapeHtml(p.variant)+''; return '
  • ' +'
    ' +''+nm+'' +''+urg.lbl+'' +'
    ' +(getDueDate(p.launchDate)?'
    Due: '+getDueDate(p.launchDate)+'
    ':'') +(p.launchDate?'
    Launch: '+escapeHtml(p.launchDate)+'
    ':'') +'
    Missing: '+missing.map(escapeHtml).join(', ')+'
    ' +'
    • '; }).join(''):'
  • ✓ All tasks complete
    • '; return '
    ' +'
    ' +''+team.label+'' +''+outstanding.length+' outstanding' +'
    ' +'
      '+rows+'
    ' +'
    '; }).join(''); } var log=getChangeLog(); var ul=document.getElementById("changeLogList"); if(!ul) return; if(!log.length){ul.innerHTML='
  • No changes recorded yet.
    • ';return;} ul.innerHTML=log.map(function(entry){ var d=new Date(entry.ts); var timeStr=d.toLocaleDateString("en-SG",{day:"2-digit",month:"short",year:"numeric"})+" "+d.toLocaleTimeString("en-SG",{hour:"2-digit",minute:"2-digit"}); var src=entry.action==="delete"?"Deleted":entry.action==="calendar"?"Calendar":"Linesheet"; var srcStyle=entry.action==="delete"?"color:#991b1b":entry.action==="calendar"?"color:#0369a1":"color:#6f665d"; var nameStr=escapeHtml(entry.productName||"Unknown"); if(entry.variant&&entry.variant!=="—"&&entry.variant!=="(shared)") nameStr+=" — "+escapeHtml(entry.variant); var fromStr=String(entry.from||"—"); var toStr=String(entry.to||"—"); return "
  • " +"
    " +""+nameStr+"" +""+src+"   "+escapeHtml(timeStr)+"" +"
    " +"
    "+escapeHtml(entry.field||"")+"
    " +"
    " +""+escapeHtml(fromStr)+"" +"→" +""+escapeHtml(toStr)+"" +"
    " +"
    • "; }).join(""); } function downloadMeasurementTemplate(){ var sizing = document.getElementById("f_sizing").value || "XS,S,M,L,XL"; var sizes = getSizeTokens(sizing); if(!sizes.length){ alert("Please enter sizing first (e.g. XS, S, M, L, XL)."); return; } var matrix = getMeasurementMatrix(); var headers = ["Measurement Point"].concat(sizes.map(function(s){ return s + " (inch)"; })); var rows = matrix.length > 0 ? matrix.map(function(row){ return [row.label||""].concat(sizes.map(function(s){ return (row.values && row.values[s]) || ""; })); }) : [["Chest Width"].concat(sizes.map(function(){return "";})), ["Waist"].concat(sizes.map(function(){return "";})), ["Hip"].concat(sizes.map(function(){return "";})), ["Length"].concat(sizes.map(function(){return ""; }))]; var csvLines = [headers].concat(rows).map(function(r){ return r.map(function(v){ return '"'+String(v).replace(/"/g,'""')+'"'; }).join(","); }); var csv = csvLines.join("\n"); var a = document.createElement("a"); a.href = "data:text/csv;charset=utf-8," + encodeURIComponent(csv); a.download = "measurement_template.csv"; a.click(); } function parseCSVRow(line){ var result=[]; var cur=""; var inQ=false; for(var i=0;i
